summary: No longer the golden generation, but still a very good technical 4-2-3-1 that can beat top teams, with pace to exploit high-pressing sides.
style: 4-2-3-1 — wingers 1v1 to create, support runs under/over the wingers, pace in behind against high-pressing teams, high-press & counter-press.

counterReliance.note: Pace in behind to punish high-pressing teams

strengths: 1v1 wingers with supporting runs over and under
Pace in behind against aggressive opponents
weaknesses: Building out from the back and playing through teams

keyPlayers.name: Jérémy Doku
keyPlayers.note: Goals and assists — skilful dribbler with pace & power

tactics: Get the wingers 1v1 with runners around them, exploit space in behind against pressing teams, and counter-press to win it back. Still capable of beating the best despite build-up struggles.
sources: John Walker (@johnwalker_1986) — pre-tournament tactical scouting, May–Jun 2026
